title: Failing to Load Excel JS Workbook from a Buffer
author: Ari1029
body:
Hi, I would like to report an issue with loading Excel JS workbooks loading from a buffer. After reviewing Excel JS documentation, I noticed that this was the correct method:
![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/45503218/e2ae1a8d-4fe9-48f3-9007-5e519adcd3fb)

The goal is to load a template Excel sheet like the following:
![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/45503218/6022f3d8-f439-4d9e-be89-eeb2256eefa6)

However, when I attempt to load this custom Excel template using the code I sent above, I receive the following error in console:
![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/45503218/fdb370d5-7774-4dcf-abb7-eda49c515c4e)

Is there any other code I could use to load a workbook from customExcelBuffer? Please let me know, thank you.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @Ari1029 Can you provide the excel file and post the full code?
